# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: example-deployment-no-istio
  labels:
    app: example-app
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: example-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: example-app
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false" # Disable Istio sidecar injection for this pod
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: example-container
          image: nginx:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: another-service-low-latency
  labels:
    app: another-app
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: another-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: another-app
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false" # Explicitly disable Istio sidecar injection for this pod
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: low-latency-container
          image: custom-low-latency-image:v1.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: MY_ENV_VAR
              value: "some_value"
